◎简　　介  

　　Cryptid is set in the idyllic lakeside town of Mörkstad, whose peaceful existence is shattered by a series of terrifying and unexplained events, potentially linked to an ancient legend. Following the mysterious death of a high school student, his friends try to find out what happened but the closer they get to the truth, the more they are drawn to the dark waters of the lake.
